data.title: Extract utility functions from oversized shell scripts (merge-to-main.sh, validate.sh, validate-review-output.sh)
data.description: merge-to-main.sh (1549 lines), validate.sh (1328 lines), validate-review-output.sh (1050 lines). Extract pure utility functions into lib-*.sh modules. AC: no shell script >1000 lines, all tests pass.
